flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Northwestern College rose 81% between 2006 and 2009 ($4.4k → $8.0k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 50% at Northwestern College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (464 vs 928).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Northwestern College rose 16% between 2006 and 2009 ($17.1k → $19.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Northwestern College rose 16% between 2006 and 2009 ($17.1k → $19.9k).
